The specification correctly identifies KB-317 as a duplicate of KB-312 and establishes appropriate administrative goals. However, **Step 1 contains a critical technical error**: the `archiveTask` API cannot archive a task from the "triage" column — it only works on tasks in "done". This will cause runtime failure when executed.

This is a well-crafted administrative specification for archiving a duplicate task. The mission is clear, steps are concrete and verifiable, file references are accurate, and the technical approach correctly accounts for the column transition constraints (archive only works from "done"). Review Level 0 is appropriate as no code changes are required.
